message:
feat(ftui-core): add key sequence interpreter (bd-2vne.2)

Add KeySequenceInterpreter for detecting multi-key sequences like
Esc Esc with configurable timeout handling. Provides feed(event, now)
-> Action API with Emit, EmitSequence, and Pending variants.

- KeySequenceConfig: timeout, detect_double_escape options
- KeySequenceKind: recognized sequence patterns (DoubleEscape)
- KeySequenceAction: Emit(KeyEvent), EmitSequence { kind, keys }, Pending
- 21 unit tests covering timeout, edge cases, configuration

Closes bd-2vne.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
